name: EJE (Hong Kong) Holdings Limited
summary: EJE (Hong Kong) Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, sells, and distributes custom-made furniture in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It is also involved in the property and securities investment activities; and money lending and media related services businesses. The company was formerly known as Jia Meng Holdings Limited and changed its name to EJE (Hong Kong) Holdings Limited in January 2018. EJE (Hong Kong) Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
